name: WRF On Slurm
summary: Run WRF real-data jobs on Slurm with MPI sizing, real.exe staging, restart, and I/O planning.
description: This skill provides a conservative Slurm wrapper for WRF real-data cases, including run-directory staging, met_em linking, real.exe and wrf.exe MPI launch planning, RSL log capture, restart interval review, and dry-run-first execution.

tools.name: real.exe
tools.notes: WRF real-data initialization executable from a site-approved WRF build.

tools.name: wrf.exe
tools.notes: WRF model executable from a site-approved WRF build.

tools.name: ncdump
tools.notes: Useful for inspecting met_em and wrfout metadata.

inputs.name: wrf_run_template
inputs.description: Clean WRF run directory template containing real.exe, wrf.exe, and required runtime tables.

inputs.name: namelist_input
inputs.description: WRF namelist.input file aligned with the WPS met_em files.

inputs.name: met_em_files
inputs.description: WPS met_em files for the target real-data case.

inputs.name: output_dir
inputs.description: Durable output directory for the staged case, RSL logs, wrfout files, restart files, and run records.

outputs.name: wrf_launch_plan
outputs.description: Reviewable Slurm, MPI, namelist, met_em, real.exe, wrf.exe, restart, and output plan.

outputs.name: staged_wrf_case
outputs.description: Copied WRF run directory with namelist.input and linked met_em files.

outputs.name: wrf_initial_boundary_files
outputs.description: wrfinput_d0* and wrfbdy_d01 files generated by real.exe.

outputs.name: wrf_outputs
outputs.description: wrfout_d0*, wrfrst_d0*, rsl.out.*, and rsl.error.* files from wrf.exe.

examples.title: Plan or run a WRF real-data Slurm case

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Run plan-only mode first, then set RUN_WRF=1 on a short debug partition with a site-approved WRF build and a small WPS-generated met_em set.

references.title: WRF Users Guide: WRF Software and Computation
WRF online tutorial: Run the model for a single domain
